name: codex-plugins
description: Codex plugin packaging the ultrareview-plan, ultradev, ultrareview, and ultrasimplify workflow skills.

interface.shortDescription: Plan review, ultradev, review, and simplification skills.
interface.longDescription: Packages the $ultrareview-plan implementation-plan review workflow, the $ultradev staged implementation workflow, the $ultrareview parallel code review workflow, and the $ultrasimplify behavior-preserving simplification workflow for Codex use.
defaultPrompt: Use $ultrareview-plan to review this implementation plan with focused subagents.
